A LITTLE LETTER FOR YOU
💌

Hey, My Kitty... ❤️

If you're here, thank you for giving me these few minutes.

I know you're upset with me. Before you decide anything, please let me show you what's inside my heart.

CHAPTER ONE • US
My safest place ❤️
CHAPTER TWO • MY APOLOGY

I'm really sorry.

I know I hurt you, and I truly regret it. I never wanted to be the reason for your pain. You mean so much to me, and seeing this distance between us hurts more than I can explain.

I'm not asking you to forget what happened right away. I just hope you'll believe that my apology is genuine.

I'll do my best to be better because I don't want to lose what we have.

I'm sorry, my love.
I luv uh soooo much my kitty. 🫶❤️💞

❤️

Thank You, My Love

Thank you for giving us another chance.

I know words aren't enough, so I'll prove my love through my actions.

I promise I'll love you louder than my mistakes.

ALWAYS AND FOREVER

In every lifetime... I'd still choose you. ❤️

I love you so much, my kitty. ❤️

Forever yours,
Your annoying girl. 🫶🥺❤️
